title: DualFusion's Lucky Blocks
description: DualFusion's take on the legacy lucky block mods that where more popular for 1.12. (Part of DualFusion's "Mini-Mod" project)
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf4105c8ab34a8d5e21f2126205967f9200098_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1207)

**This is a DualFusion "Mini-Mod" which is a part of a small DualFusion project where we would release or update a small mod each month.**

DualFusions take on the legacy lucky block mods for version 1.12
this mod adds lucky blocks each lucky block has a chance of droping a random item in its loot set
gold lucky block
Overworld lucky block
Nether Lucky block
End Lucky block
frosted lucky block
deepdark lucky block
